title: fix(deps): update module github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl to v1.4.0
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Change | Age | Confidence |
|---|---|---|---|
| [github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl) | `v1.3.0` -> `v1.4.0` | [![age](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/age/go/github.com%2fcheckpoint-restore%2fcheckpointctl/v1.4.0?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![confidence](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/confidence/go/github.com%2fcheckpoint-restore%2fcheckpointctl/v1.3.0/v1.4.0?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl (github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl)</summary>

### [`v1.4.0`](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/releases/tag/v1.4.0)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/compare/v1.3.0...v1.4.0)

#### What's Changed

- go.mod: update dependencies by [@​rst0git](https://redirect.github.com/rst0git) in [#​152](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/152)
- Create directories with 700 and not 644 by [@​adrianreber](https://redirect.github.com/adrianreber) in [#​154](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/154)
- fix(ci): move from Fedora to Ubuntu by [@​snprajwal](https://redirect.github.com/snprajwal) in [#​158](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/158)
- Add build command for OCI images by [@​rst0git](https://redirect.github.com/rst0git) in [#​156](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/156)
- readme: add build command example by [@​rst0git](https://redirect.github.com/rst0git) in [#​159](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/159)
- ci: group dependabot updates by [@​snprajwal](https://redirect.github.com/snprajwal) in [#​160](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/160)
- chore(deps): Bump the all group with 3 updates by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​161](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/161)
- go.mod: update dependencies by [@​rst0git](https://redirect.github.com/rst0git) in [#​163](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/163)
- chore(deps): Bump github.com/containers/storage from 1.57.2 to 1.58.0 in the all group by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​164](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/164)
- Replace olekukonko/tablewriter with text/tabwriter by [@​adrianreber](https://redirect.github.com/adrianreber) in [#​167](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/167)
- go.mod: update dependencies by [@​rst0git](https://redirect.github.com/rst0git) in [#​170](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/170)
- Create new release v1.4.0 by [@​rst0git](https://redirect.github.com/rst0git) in [#​171](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/171)

**Full Changelog**: <https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/compare/v1.3.0...v1.4.0>

</details>
